title: ice40: BRAM negedge read is one cycle late

features.name: iCE40 BRAM inference with negedge read port
features.description: Code should include a RAM inference pattern where write operations use posedge clock and read operations use negedge clock on the same system clock signal

features.name: iCE40 BRAM negedge read address sampling timing
features.description: Code should include a BRAM inference pattern where the read address is sampled on the negative clock edge but read data becomes available only after an extra clock cycle delay on iCE40 hardware
